boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the legal operator execute the filing, disclosure, or contract action now? Focus: board consent delivery.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact board approval match closes boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing current board approval dependency blocks execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: current board approval, date, and covered action match

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. Current control record shows missing board approval, date, and action match. Execution is blocked. Policy requires closed source boundary before any filing or consent delivery. No authority to proceed.
open_blockers: current board approval, date, and covered action match
